## Summary

Describe the change and its user-visible effect.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests or manual checks were completed.
- [ ] Public documentation was updated where needed.
- [ ] Privacy and data-flow implications were reviewed.
- [ ] No credentials, signing material, personal data, private paths, or restricted assets are included.
- [ ] Third-party material and licences are documented.
- [ ] Code contributions are submitted under GPL-3.0-or-later.
- [ ] Original artwork/documentation contributions are submitted under CC BY-SA 4.0.
